title: Test and service electric outdoor power equipment
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Test and service electric outdoor power equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for test

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace inspection and service procedures 1.3 Identify and manage hazards associated with the tasks1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace inspection and service procedures 1.3 Identify and manage hazards associated with the tasks1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace inspection and service procedures 1.3 Identify and manage hazards associated with the tasks1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for test

elements.title: Conduct test and interpret results

pcs.text: Carry out operational tests according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Compare test results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Obtain authorisation to proceed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out operational tests according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Compare test results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Obtain authorisation to proceed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out operational tests according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Compare test results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Obtain authorisation to proceed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct test and interpret results

elements.title: Prepare to service equipment

pcs.text: Analyse and select service options most appropriate to the circumstances3.2 Select and check tools, equipment and materials for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse and select service options most appropriate to the circumstances3.2 Select and check tools, equipment and materials for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse and select service options most appropriate to the circumstances3.2 Select and check tools, equipment and materials for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare to service equipment

elements.title: Service equipment

pcs.text: Service, adjust and replace components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems4.2 Carry out post-service testing according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Service, adjust and replace components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems4.2 Carry out post-service testing according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Service, adjust and replace components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems4.2 Carry out post-service testing according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Service equipment

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
